name: QuizLock
description: Block distracting sites until you pass an AI generated quiz.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; connect-src 'self' https://api.groq.com http://localhost:8000
